ItacPersonItem.Notes: See the short biography of Bondino, by Gianni Ballistrieri, in DBI. Bondino is not to be confused with the Ferrarese printer. Bondino`s presence and contribution to Aldo Manuzio`s Neakademia, is also asserted by Francesco Piovan, `Forteguerri, Scipione`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
